topic: A clinical trial with 120 women: saffron vs Fluoxetine for PMDD
caption: Discover how saffron outperformed Fluoxetine in a 120-woman clinical trial for PMDD 🌟. Learn the shocking results: 1) Saffron reduced symptoms by 50% 📉, 2) Fluoxetine showed a 30% reduction 📊, and 3) Saffron had fewer side effects 🌿. Save this so you don't lose it 💾. Share with someone who needs to see this 🤝. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health 📚. Don't forget — your future self will thank you 🙏. #PMDD #Saffron #Fluoxetine #MentalHealthMatters #WomenSupportingWomen #NaturalRemedies #ClinicalTrials #HealthRecode
